name: Broiled Marinated Tofu Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 4 thick slices whole wheat bread, lightly toasted
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tofu into 1-inch thick slices and drain.
2. Place the tofu slices on a sheet pan and cover with another baking pan or cookie sheet. Weigh down the tofu with something heavy to remove excess water for at least 30 minutes.
3. In a small cast iron skillet, toast the cumin, chili powder, and oregano until fragrant. Remove from heat and add olive oil, minced garlic, white wine vinegar, and dry white wine. Bring to a simmer.
4. Transfer the drained tofu slices to a ceramic or glass dish and pour the marinade over the tofu. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least one day, up to three to four days.
5. Preheat the broiler.
6. Remove the marinated tofu from the refrigerator, pat dry, and broil about 6 inches away from the heat until crispy on each side.
7. Spread mayonnaise on a slice of toasted bread. Place the tofu half-slices on top of the mayonnaise, followed by tomato, arugula, and optional radicchio slices.
8. Spread chili mayo on another slice of toasted bread and cover the sandwich.
Yield: 2 servings
